Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event log and produce a POWL model The log shows several cases with different paths Lets extract the process patterns

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activities OR MS QS AS IQC TST RT PK LB DP D

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Every case starts with OR then MS then QS then AS That seems sequential OR to MS to QS to AS

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After AS there is an In line Quality Check IQC loop Cases 1 2 3 5 show IQC followed by AS again sometimes multiple IQC AS iterations Case 4 has no IQC at all

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: So AS can be followed by IQC and IQC can lead back to AS or AS can go directly to TST

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 AS IQC AS TST Case 2 AS IQC AS TST Case 4 AS TST

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 3 AS IQC IQC AS IQC AS TST That suggests IQC can be repeated without AS in between

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Perhaps the process is after AS you can do an IQC and if it fails you can re do IQC without going back to AS but eventually you may need to go back to AS for rework

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The POWL loop star A B means you execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: To allow repeating IQC we could use star IQC tau

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: star IQC tau will do IQC at least once and then optionally repeat

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The whole block from the first AS to TST can be modeled as star AS star IQC tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That fits trace 3 AS then IQC IQC then AS then IQC then AS then exit to TST It also fits case 4 AS then exit

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: TST can be followed by RT which goes back to TST Case 1 TST RT TST Case 5 TST RT TST RT TST Case 2 and 4 TST then PK

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So TST and RT form a loop star TST RT

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After that we have PK then an optional LB Case 2 skips LB after PK goes to DP Others do PK LB DP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So LB is optional Thats a choice between LB and skip So PK then XOR LB tau then DP then D

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The overall sequence OR MS QS then the AS IQC loop block then the TST RT loop block then PK optional LB DP D All these are sequential

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The log shows strictly sequential ordering no parallel activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can define a root StrictPartialOrder with nodes OR MS QS loopAS loopTST PK choiceLB DP D and order edges OR to MS MS to QS QS to loopAS loopAS to loopTST loopTST to PK PK to choiceLB choiceLB to DP DP to D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 4 has no IQC and no RT Our model does AS then exits the outer loop then does TST then exits the test loop Then PK then LB or skip then DP D That matches

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 skips LB so after PK the XOR chooses tau That matches

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus the model seems correct
